name: Zoom
description: Zoom is commonly used to support strategy workflows, reviews, and handoffs.
whyUseIt: Use Zoom when the team needs more structure, visibility, or speed in strategy work.
founderWorkflow: Use Zoom to keep strategy work visible enough for fast reviews and cleaner delegation.
beginnerMistakes: Adding Zoom before the process around it is defined.
Using the tool as a reporting surface instead of a decision surface.
